response:
joke is not the heart of this serious crime.
drug trafficking moves illegal substances across borders today.
heart beats fast when police catch the smugglers.
* * *
trafficking networks operate in the shadows of cities.
many lives are ruined by these dark actions.
* * *
law enforcement works hard to stop the flow.
heart feels heavy when seeing the damage done.
* * *
prison sentences await those caught with large loads.
society suffers when drugs flood the local streets.
* * *
international cooperation is needed to fight this war.
no one should profit from selling harmful substances.
* * *
families are torn apart by the addiction crisis.
hope remains that we can end this trade.
* * *
education helps prevent young people from joining gangs.
awareness is key to stopping the spread.
* * *
justice must be served for every victim involved.
we must stand together against this global threat.
* * *
the fight continues until every street is safe.
peace will return when the trade is gone.
